38 class ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase
39 {
40 public:
41 
43  ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase(Arcane::ISubDomain* sd, const Arcane::String name);
44 
46  virtual ~ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase();
47 
48 public:
50 
51  void init(Arcane::String output_path);
52 
55 
56  template<typename Variables>
57  void addPostProcessing(Arcane::IPostProcessorWriter * writer, const Variables & variables, const Arcane::String& mesh_name=m_default_mesh_name);
58  template<typename Variables>
59  void addPostProcessing(Arcane::IPostProcessorWriter * writer, const Variables & variables, const Variables & init_variables, const Arcane::String& mesh_name=m_default_mesh_name);
60  template<typename Variables>
61 
63  void addVariables(const Variables & variables);
64 
66 
67  void saveAtTime(Arcane::Real);
68  void saveAtInitialTime(Arcane::Real);
69 
71  void stats();
72 
73 private:
74  void _checkCreateOutputDir();
75  void _saveVariablesAtTime(Arcane::Real saved_time, const Arcane::Array<Arcane::VariableList>& pp_variables);
76  template<typename Variables>
77  void _addPostProcessingVariables(const Variables & variables, Arcane::VariableList& pp_variables, Arcane::ItemGroupList& pp_groups );
78  void _addPostProcessingMesh(const Arcane::String& mesh_name);
79 
80 private:
81  Arcane::ISubDomain * m_sub_domain;
82  bool m_has_post_processing;
83  Arcane::VariableArrayReal m_times;
84  Arcane::String m_output_path;
85  Arcane::Directory m_output_directory;
86  bool m_output_dir_created;
87  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::Timer> m_pp_timer;
88  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::IPostProcessorWriter*> m_pp_writer;
89  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::VariableList> m_pp_variables;
90  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::VariableList> m_pp_init_variables;
91  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::ItemGroupList> m_pp_groups;
92  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::IMesh*> m_pp_meshes;
93  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::String> m_pp_base_directory_names;
94 
95  static ARCGEOSIM_MESH_EXPORT Arcane::String m_default_mesh_name;
96 
97  Arcane::String m_name;
98 };
99 
100 template<typename Variables>
101 void
102 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
103 addPostProcessing(Arcane::IPostProcessorWriter * pp_writer, const Variables & variables, const Arcane::String& mesh_name)
104 {
105  _addPostProcessingMesh(mesh_name);
106 
107  Arcane::VariableList pp_variables;
108  Arcane::ItemGroupList pp_groups;
109  _addPostProcessingVariables(variables,pp_variables,pp_groups);
110  m_pp_init_variables.add(pp_variables);
111  m_pp_variables.add(pp_variables);
112 
113  m_pp_groups.add(pp_groups);
114  m_pp_writer.add(pp_writer);
115  m_pp_timer.add(Arcane::Timer(m_sub_domain,Arcane::String::format("{0} for mesh {1} PostProcessorTimer",m_name,mesh_name),Arcane::Timer::TimerReal));
116 
117  m_has_post_processing = true;
118 }
119 
120 template<typename Variables>
121 void
122 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
123 addPostProcessing(Arcane::IPostProcessorWriter * pp_writer, const Variables & variables, const Variables & init_variables, const Arcane::String& mesh_name)
124 {
125  _addPostProcessingMesh(mesh_name);
126 
127  Arcane::VariableList pp_variables;
128  Arcane::ItemGroupList pp_groups;
129  m_sub_domain->traceMng()->info() << "Output variables stored at time ";
130  _addPostProcessingVariables(variables,pp_variables,pp_groups);
131  m_pp_variables.add(pp_variables);
132 
133  Arcane::VariableList pp_variables_init(pp_variables.clone());
134  m_sub_domain->traceMng()->info() << "Output variables stored at initial time ";
135  _addPostProcessingVariables(init_variables,pp_variables_init,pp_groups);
136  m_pp_init_variables.add(pp_variables_init);
137 
138  m_pp_groups.add(pp_groups);
139  m_pp_writer.add(pp_writer);
140  // TODO: it should be nice to have the service name for pp_writer
141  m_pp_timer.add(Arcane::Timer(m_sub_domain,Arcane::String::format("{0} for mesh {1} PostProcessorTimer",m_name,mesh_name),Arcane::Timer::TimerReal));
142 
143  m_has_post_processing = true;
144 }
145 
146 template<typename Variables>
147 void
148 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
149 _addPostProcessingVariables(const Variables & variables, Arcane::VariableList& pp_variables, Arcane::ItemGroupList& pp_groups )
150 {
151  Arcane::IVariableMng * var_mng = m_sub_domain->variableMng();
152  Arcane::IMesh * mesh = m_pp_meshes.back();
153  Arcane::ITraceMng * traceMng = m_sub_domain->traceMng();
154 
155  const Arcane::Integer nb_var = variables.size();
156  if (nb_var!=0)
157  {
158  std::set<Arcane::String> used_variables; // Liste des variables d�j� indiqu�es
159  std::set<Arcane::String> used_groups; // Liste des groupes d�j� indiqu�es
160  for(Arcane::VariableList::Enumerator j(pp_variables);++j;)
161  used_variables.insert((*j)->name());
162  for(Arcane::ItemGroupList::Enumerator j(pp_groups);++j;)
163  used_groups.insert((*j).name());
164 
165  traceMng->info() << " ";
166  traceMng->info() << "-- Output Variable List: (" << nb_var << " variables):";
167  for( Arcane::Integer i=0; i<nb_var; ++i )
168  {
169  Arcane::String varname = variables[i];
170  Arcane::IVariable* var = var_mng->findMeshVariable(mesh, varname);
171  if (!var)
172  traceMng->fatal() << "PostProcessing: the variable named '" << varname << "' does not exist";
173  Arcane::eItemKind ik = var->itemKind();
174  if (ik!=Arcane::IK_Node && ik!=Arcane::IK_Edge && ik!=Arcane::IK_Face && ik!=Arcane::IK_Cell && ik!=Arcane::IK_Particle && ik!=Arcane::IK_Unknown)
175  traceMng->fatal() << "PostProcessing: variable (" << varname << ") must"
176  << " be a mesh variable (node, edge, face, cell or particle support)";
177  if (used_variables.find(varname)==used_variables.end())
178  {
179  if (var->computeFunction())
180  traceMng->info() << "Variable <" << varname << "> with compute function";
181  else
182  traceMng->info() << "Variable <" << varname << ">";
183  pp_variables.add(var);
184  used_variables.insert(varname);
185 
186  // Acc�s au groupe de la variable m�me pour les variables d�sactiv�es
187  if(ik==Arcane::IK_Node || ik==Arcane::IK_Edge || ik==Arcane::IK_Face || ik==Arcane::IK_Cell || ik==Arcane::IK_Particle)
188  {
189  Arcane::IItemFamily * family;
190  if (ik==Arcane::IK_Particle)
191  family = mesh->findItemFamily(ik, "Particle", false);
192  else
193  family = mesh->itemFamily(var->itemKind());
194  Arcane::ItemGroup variable_group;
195  if (var->itemGroupName().null())
196  variable_group = family->allItems();
197  else
198  variable_group = family->findGroup(var->itemGroupName());
199  ARCANE_ASSERT((!variable_group.null()),("Unexpected associated group for variable '%s'",var->fullName().localstr()));
200  if (used_groups.find(variable_group.name()) == used_groups.end())
201  {
202  used_groups.insert(variable_group.name());
203  pp_groups.add(variable_group);
204  }
205  }
206  }
207  else
208  {
209  traceMng->warning() << "Variable <" << varname << "> registered twice for post processing";
210  }
211  }
212  }
213 }
214 
215 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_MESH_EXPORTERS_ARCGEOSIMPOSTPROCESSINGBASE_H */
